name: wechat-mini-star-defense
description: A more complex tower-defense WeChat Mini Game.

scripts.test: node -c game.js && node -c js/logic.js && node -c scripts/build-release.js && node -c scripts/doctor.js && node -c scripts/write-qa-report.js && node -c test/logic.test.js && node -c test/simulation.test.js && node -c test/render-contract.test.js && node -c test/release.test.js && zsh -n open-in-wechat-devtools.command && node scripts/build-release.js && node test/logic.test.js && node test/simulation.test.js && node test/render-contract.test.js && node test/release.test.js && node scripts/doctor.js
scripts.qa:report: npm run build:release && node scripts/doctor.js && node scripts/write-qa-report.js
